headline: Coca-Cola Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Updates Full Year Guidance
summary: ATLANTA, April 28, 2026--The Coca-Cola Company today reported first quarter 2026 results. "We’ve had a strong start to the year," said Henrique Braun, CEO of The Coca-Cola Company. "Our performance this quarter reflects our unwavering focus on staying close to the consumer, executing locally and managing complexity. Yet there’s so much more we can do as we navigate a dynamic environment. Our team is motivated by the opportunity to build on the company’s great foundation."

raw.headline: Coca-Cola Reports First Quarter 2026 Results and Updates Full Year Guidance
raw.summary: ATLANTA, April 28, 2026--The Coca-Cola Company today reported first quarter 2026 results. "We’ve had a strong start to the year," said Henrique Braun, CEO of The Coca-Cola Company. "Our performance this quarter reflects our unwavering focus on staying close to the consumer, executing locally and managing complexity. Yet there’s so much more we can do as we navigate a dynamic environment. Our team is motivated by the opportunity to build on the company’s great foundation."
